interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level content for the home page: main service areas, quick actions, and summaries.

interfaces.name: getFeaturedOffers
interfaces.description: Get featured stress management programs, nutrition bundles, and free challenges for the home page.

interfaces.name: getGoalRecommendations
interfaces.description: Provide navigation recommendations and highlighted offerings based on a user goal for the 'Get Started' helper.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: User goal code, e.g., 'improve_running', 'manage_stress', 'build_strength', 'general_wellbeing'

interfaces.name: getConsultationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters and sort options for the consultations listing page.

interfaces.name: searchConsultations
interfaces.description: Search and list consultations with applied filters and sorting for the consultations listing page.

duration_minutes.description: Exact session length in minutes, e.g., 60

earliest_start_time.description: Earliest allowed start time in 'HH:MM' 24h format, e.g., '17:00'

latest_start_time.description: Latest allowed start time in 'HH:MM' 24h format

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'rating_high_to_low', 'earliest_availability'

interfaces.name: getConsultationDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific consultation service and its available time slots on a given date.

parameters.name: consultationServiceId
parameters.description: ID of the ConsultationService to display on the detail page

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format to filter available time slots

interfaces.name: addConsultationBookingToCart
interfaces.description: Add a selected consultation time slot to the cart with participant contact details.

parameters.name: consultationTimeSlotId
parameters.description: Selected ConsultationTimeSlot ID

interfaces.name: getProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get category, duration, price, and rating filter options for the programs listing page.

interfaces.name: searchPrograms
interfaces.description: Search active programs with filters and sorting for the programs listing page.

duration_weeks.description: Exact program duration in weeks, e.g., 4

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'rating_high_to_low', 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'popularity'

interfaces.name: getProgramDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information and available tiers for a specific program.

parameters.name: programId
parameters.description: ID of the Program to display on the detail page

latest_start_date.description: ISO date, e.g., 30 days from today

interfaces.name: addProgramEnrollmentToCart
interfaces.description: Add a program enrollment with selected tier and start date to the cart.

parameters.name: programId
parameters.description: Selected Program ID to enroll in

parameters.name: programTierId
parameters.description: Optional ProgramTier ID if a non-default tier is selected

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Selected program start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

interfaces.name: getClassScheduleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the classes schedule page (time of day, intensity, duration).

interfaces.name: getClassSchedule
interfaces.description: Get an interactive schedule of group classes for a specific date with filters applied.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Selected schedule date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

start_time_from.description: Earliest start time in 'HH:MM' 24h format, e.g., '08:00'

start_time_to.description: Latest start time in 'HH:MM' 24h format, e.g., '12:00'

max_duration_minutes.description: Maximum class duration in minutes, e.g., 45

interfaces.name: getClassSessionDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific group class session (occurrence).

parameters.name: groupClassSessionId
parameters.description: GroupClassSession ID for the selected class occurrence

interfaces.name: addClassSessionBookingToCart
interfaces.description: Add a group class session booking to the cart with number of attendees and contact details.

parameters.name: groupClassSessionId
parameters.description: Selected GroupClassSession ID to book

interfaces.name: getTrainingPlannerInitialState
interfaces.description: Get an empty weekly planner structure and any default settings for starting a new training plan.

default_start_time.description: Suggested default time for new workouts, e.g., '07:00'

interfaces.name: getWorkoutTemplateFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the workout template library in the training planner.

interfaces.name: searchWorkoutTemplates
interfaces.description: Search workout templates by type, duration, and intensity for use in the training planner.

interfaces.name: saveTrainingPlan
interfaces.description: Save a weekly training plan composed of workout templates assigned to days and times.

parameters.name: plan_name
parameters.description: User-provided plan name, e.g., 'balanced_week_plan'

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Optional plan start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

interfaces.name: getCoachingServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of coaching categories such as nutrition, performance, and wellbeing for the Coaching & Services page.

interfaces.name: getNutritionBundleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options specific to nutrition coaching bundles.

interfaces.name: searchNutritionBundles
interfaces.description: Search nutrition coaching bundles with filters and sorting.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'total_minutes_high_to_low'

interfaces.name: getNutritionBundleDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific nutrition coaching bundle.

parameters.name: bundleId
parameters.description: ID of the NutritionBundle to display

interfaces.name: addNutritionBundleToCart
interfaces.description: Add a selected nutrition coaching bundle to the cart with optional coach preference.

parameters.name: bundleId
parameters.description: NutritionBundle ID to add to cart

parameters.name: preferredCoachId
parameters.description: Optional preferred Coach ID for this bundle

parameters.name: start_within_days
parameters.description: Optional requested start window in days, e.g., 30

interfaces.name: getChallengeFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the challenges listing page, including price types.

interfaces.name: searchChallenges
interfaces.description: Search challenges by price type and duration for the challenges listing page.

price_type.description: e.g., 'free' to show only free challenges

interfaces.name: getChallengeDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific challenge, including available themes.

parameters.name: challengeId
parameters.description: ID of the Challenge to display on the detail page

interfaces.name: registerForChallenge
interfaces.description: Register the user for a specific challenge with chosen start date, time, and themes.

parameters.name: challengeId
parameters.description: Challenge ID to register for

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Challenge start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

parameters.name: preferred_email_time
parameters.description: Preferred daily email time in 'HH:MM' 24h format, e.g., '08:00'

interfaces.name: getArticleCategoryOptions
interfaces.description: Get article topic categories for filtering in the articles listing page.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search and filter articles by keyword, category, and maximum reading time.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query, e.g., 'injury prevention for runners'

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content and metadata for an article, including whether it is saved to the reading list.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the Article to display

interfaces.name: saveArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save/bookmark an article to the user's reading list.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Article ID to save

interfaces.name: getReadingListArticles
interfaces.description: Get all articles currently saved in the user's reading list.

interfaces.name: getMembershipFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for memberships, including billing period and benefits such as gym access.

interfaces.name: searchMembershipPlans
interfaces.description: Search membership plans by billing period, benefits, and optional price cap.

requires_gym_access.description: If true, only memberships with includes_gym_access = true are returned

interfaces.name: getMembershipPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a selected membership plan.

parameters.name: membershipPlanId
parameters.description: ID of the MembershipPlan to display

interfaces.name: addMembershipToCart
interfaces.description: Add a membership plan to the cart as a recurring item.

parameters.name: membershipPlanId
parameters.description: MembershipPlan ID to add to cart

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Optional membership start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

interfaces.name: getYogaAddOnFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for yoga add-ons/class passes.

interfaces.name: searchYogaAddOns
interfaces.description: Search yoga add-ons that can be attached to a membership, filtering by billing period and classes per week.

min_classes_per_week.description: Minimum yoga classes per week, e.g., 1

interfaces.name: addAddOnToCart
interfaces.description: Add an add-on such as a yoga class pass to the cart, associated with the current user's membership selection.

parameters.name: addOnId
parameters.description: AddOn ID to add to cart

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Optional add-on start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get a consolidated view of all items currently in the cart, including one-off and recurring subtotals.

details.description: Human-readable summary such as date/time or tier

start_date.description: Applicable start date in ISO format if relevant

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the cart.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: CartItem ID to remove

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get the final order summary based on the current cart for the checkout page.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Create an order from the current cart with purchaser and payment details.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: Payment method code, e.g., 'card', 'bank_transfer'

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About & Info page, including mission, coach summaries, and contact info.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form inquiry from the About & Info page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current single-user cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _saveCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist the current cart state after modifications.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute one-off and recurring totals for the current cart.

helperFunctions.name: _validateProgramStartDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to ensure a program start date falls within the allowed window.

helperFunctions.name: _findNextAvailableSlots
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to determine next available time slots for consultations and classes based on filters.
